description: Use this API to set or reset the adjustment control mode flags for all automatically adjustable transformers contained in the specified subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = tflg(sid, all, opt)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: opt
parameters.description: Option to select the adjustment control mode flags of those transformers being processed. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
